---
title: "Simon Christensen"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: IMG_2722.JPG
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/scsimonsez
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/simon-christensen-204796337/
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
---
Welcome to my Website! A little bit about me and my life:

I am from a small town in southern California called San Clemente known for its amazing coastline and great surf spots. I grew up going to the beach, surfing, skating, and snowboarding. I also played basketball, football, and baseball, sticking with the latter through high school and even into my first semester of college. I also love weightlifting and playing guitar. What should you take away from all of this? I am a very quick learner and always determined to put out my best work possible. I am also able to adapt to any environment I am put into, whether it be in a team-oriented or remote job (although I favor working in person with a team, as that's how the best jobs get done). You will find links to two projects that I completed during my time at Cal State University, Fullerton as well as my resume in the top right of this page. I hope you enjoy what I have to offer here and are interested in what I have to offer in the workplace!

## Education
Saddleback College | Mission Viejo, California | August 2021 - May 2023 \\
Cal State University, Fullerton \| Fullerton, California \| August 2023 - May 2026

## Experience

In-N-Out Burger \| Associate - Level 6 (cook) \| Jan 2023 - present
